kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Beatrix goes with none of Blacksmith, Highrow, or Southgate.
Between Beatrix and 12 coins, one goes with Eastcheap and the other with Millpond.
If Tanner does not go with 12 coins, then Millpond goes with Boots.
Exactly one of the artisan who makes Boots, the artisan in Highrow, and the artisan in Southgate belongs to the Joiners' Guild.
No members of the Clothiers' Guild are in the River Ward.
If Pottery does not go with 9 coins, then Blacksmith goes with Rope.
Millpond goes with exactly one of Godfrey, Weaver, or Pottery.
Either Godfrey goes with Fletcher or someone in the Market Ward goes with Horseshoes (but not both).
Either Godfrey belongs to the Market Ward or all members of the Joiners' Guild belong to the Market Ward.
The Tanner's levy is higher than both the artisan who makes Pottery and the artisan in Kingsford.
Edmund goes with at least two of Weaver, Rope, Highrow, and 10 coins.
Eastcheap goes with exactly one of Cedric, Pottery, or 11 coins.
Pottery, Eastcheap, and Millpond go with Edmund, 11 coins, and 12 coins, in some order.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Esther goes with none of Bass, Foxglen, or Pinehollow.
Between Esther and 5 lb, one goes with Birchpool and the other with Mossbank.
If Crappie does not go with 5 lb, then Mossbank goes with Crankbait.
Exactly one of the angler using the Crankbait, the angler at Foxglen, and the angler at Pinehollow belongs to the Pike Family.
No members of the Catfish Family are in the North Watershed.
If Swimbait does not go with 2 lb, then Bass goes with Wobbler.
Mossbank goes with exactly one of Wade, Perch, or Swimbait.
Either Wade goes with Bluegill or someone in the South Watershed goes with Spoon (but not both).
Either Wade belongs to the South Watershed or all members of the Pike Family belong to the South Watershed.
The angler who landed the Crappie's weight is higher than both the angler using the Swimbait and the angler at Grayreach.
Royce goes with at least two of Perch, Wobbler, Foxglen, and 3 lb.
Birchpool goes with exactly one of Mabel, Swimbait, or 4 lb.
Swimbait, Birchpool, and Mossbank go with Royce, 4 lb, and 5 lb, in some order.
